engagementShape: fixed-scope discovery sprint (2 weeks), with optional implementation phase
introContext: AECTech 2026 — sponsor or exhibitor; first conversation.
callObjective: Identify one concrete pain in Knowledge Architecture's AI / data roadmap that Arvaya can credibly accelerate, then decide whether a 2-week discovery sprint is worth proposing.
hypothesis: Knowledge Architecture has shipped its core product but is now under pressure to add AI-native capabilities. The applied-ML / data org is likely thin relative to the roadmap, so build-vs-partner is live.
meetingContext: First conversation. Knowledge Architecture is on the AECTech 2026 exhibitor list. Use the brief to find a credible wedge before the meeting.
description: Provider of Synthesis, an intranet platform designed specifically for AEC firms to help with knowledge management and employee engagement.
